subcodes.first_line: O Abbas! His honor Haydar-'Ali hath made mention of thee, and the Sun of divine favor - glorified be His majesty - hath shone upon thee from the horizon of the prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عباس جناب حیدر قبل علی ذکرت نمود و آفتاب عنایت حق جل جلاله از افق سجن بتو
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
